_comment: Template for scripts/ingest-referral-contacts.mjs. Real batches are gitignored (data/import/referral-contacts-*.json) because they contain contact PII; this placeholder example is the documented format. Required per row: orgName, segment, sourceUrl. Optional: contactName, role, email, phone, website, city, state, confidence, verificationMethod, tags, notes. segment must be one of: community_peer, school_counseling, primary_care, hospital_case_mgmt.

contacts.notes: Replace this row with real, source-verified contacts.
